title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 383.020 - Director to issue license, when
text:
383.020.  Director to issue license, when. — The director of the department of commerce and insurance shall, within thirty days after any such articles of association are filed with him, determine if the proposed association meets the requirements of sections 383.010 to 383.040, and if it does, shall issue a license to the association authorizing it to do business for a one-year period.
(L. 1975 S.B. 458 § 3) 
Effective 6-26-75
